body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

Mortgage rates have been adjusting and inventory is changing daily — it might be the perfect moment to revisit your home search.

Your personalized home matches are right here:
👉 [%custom_ylopo_listing_alert%]

Would you like me to update your search criteria or neighborhoods?
subject: Re: It’s a great time to take another look, %contact_first_name%
